channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The AI resource reallocation challenge: How can companies capture the value of time?
item.description: The McKinsey Global Institute estimates 57% of U.S. work hours could be automated in the next five years, but how do CEOs realize that "AI Time Divide...

item.title: Intuit’s CFO isn’t flinching at AI. He says it’s fueling the company’s next growth phase
item.description: AI anxiety has hit software stocks, but Intuit’s CFO says the company is leaning into the technology.

item.title: Inside the Clever Branding Strategy IHOP and Applebee’s Used to Triple Sales
item.description: How the chain restaurants teamed up to become two of the biggest brand winners of 2025.

item.title: Jeff Bezos Says Lifelong Success Comes Down to Embracing This Mindset
item.description: Are you more proud of your gifts or your choices? According to Bezos, the answer can help define your life’s trajectory.

item.title: Exclusive: Flux, backed by 8VC, raises $37 million to vibe code electronics
item.description: Matthias Wagner’s Flux, built to vibe code electronics, has raised $37 million from 8VC, Bain Capital Ventures, Liquid 2 Ventures, and Outsiders Fund.

item.title: U.S. stocks are being battered by ‘AI derangement syndrome,’ and CEOs are learning not to talk about it
item.description: Investors have become so skittish of stocks linked to AI that it's dragging down the entire U.S. market.

item.title: Meet ‘Patty,’ Burger King’s new AI assistant that lives in employees’ headsets
item.description: At hundreds of Burger King restaurants across the U.S., there’s a new invisible worker who’s tracking which ingredients are in stock, analyzing daily ...

item.title: Is AI driving away your best customers? 3 fixes for bridging gaps with growth audiences
item.description: It’s the last week of Black History Month (BHM) and it’s clear Americans are over performative values. Trite BHM-inspired merchandise sits on retailer...

item.title: In defense of not paying for AI
item.description: If you don’t want to be left behind by the AI revolution, you really need to start paying for it. At least that’s become the common refrain among some...

item.title: No, AI is not about to kill the software industry
item.description: Hello again, and thank you, as always, for spending time with Fast Company ’s Plugged In . In a remarkably influential 2011 Wall Street Journal op-ed ...

item.title: Netflix stock price rises along with Paramount while WBD falls. How the merger shakeup is impacting markets
item.description: Last night’s surprise announcement from Netflix that it was abandoning its Warner Bros. takeover bid in the wake of a “superior” offer from Paramount ...

item.title: You’ve lost the CEO succession race. Here’s your multi-million dollar bonus
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: We May Be Able to Spot Early Dementia Risk With One Simple Analysis, Study Says
item.description: Researchers found that speech patterns, like pauses and filler words, are tied to executive function.

item.title: When It Comes to Employee Retention, Principles Beat Perks Every Time
item.description: Employee stickiness is built through intentional leadership, cultural consistency, and business fluency, not flashy benefits.

item.title: A Founder’s ‘Under 26’ Hiring Post Got 3.1 Million Views, and Maybe a Lawsuit, Too
item.description: Telling the world you plan to use discriminatory hiring practices may not be the best legal strategy.
